title: chamaesyce astyla
intro: Chamaesyce astyla, also known as the coastal spurge or coastal sandmat, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chamaesyce astyla include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. Chamaesyce astyla can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
